description_long: This object is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and black metal barrel, reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms. The stock is made from a polished wood with a natural grain, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a sturdy and ergonomic grip. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted on top for aiming. Two rifles are shown side by side, with one disassembled to display a green-tipped projectile and a metallic cartridge, indicating the rifle's ammunition type. The bolt mechanism and trigger guard are clearly visible, suggesting manual cycling of the action. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban or field environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and black metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a visible bolt mechanism. Includes a green-tipped projectile and metallic cartridge.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, black barrel, and disassembled ammunition components.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the rifle's slim profile and alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's wooden grain, metal components, and ammunition parts.
description_view_3: End-on view from the muzzle, emphasizing the barrel opening and the alignment of the rifle's components.
